title: Canopy Growth Is One of the Market's Most Polarizing Stocks: 3 Scenarios for Next 12 Months
text: Canopy Growth (CGC) is one of the most polarizing stocks in the market. After years of restructuring, dilution, asset sales, and losses, investors remain sharply divided on whether Canopy Growth is finally stabilizing or simply extending a long decline. The Motley Fool analysis presents three scenarios for the next 12 months. Bullish scenario: Company achieves profitability and sustains revenue growth. Base case scenario: Continued margin pressures with modest revenue growth. Bearish scenario: Regulatory headwinds and competitive pressures lead to further stock decline. Key metrics tracked include: Adjusted EBITDA trends, free cash flow generation, gross margins in Canada cannabis and Storz & Bickel divisions, market share in adult-use cannabis. Management execution on cost reduction program will be critical determinant of stock performance.
